calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Set For Trial On Sep-25-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Continued To Sep-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rita Tan, Plaintiff/Respondent appearing in propria persona;
Robert Landsinger, representative for Defendant/Appellant Vector' A Move Ahead, Inc.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are affirmed.
Rita Tan testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
1 - photos of sofa
2 - Emails between Rita Tan and Nex Systems with photos
3 - Email regarding replacement cost of sofa
4 - Emails exchanged between the parties
5 - Email regarding estimate to reupholster sofa

Robert Landsinger testifies on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Vector' A Move Ahead, Inc. The following documentary evidence in introduced:
A - Statement of Gerard Kiernan with supporting documents (6 pages)
B - Statement of Clifford Mays with supporting documents (5 pages)
C - Receipt for Information (3 pages)
D - Email dated 5/30/14 to Rita Tan from Becky Arp with supporting documents

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Judgment Entered
